name: reign-of-grelok-ts
description: This is a small adventure game written in Typescript. It is a rewrite of [Fallout 3 Easter Egg](http://fallout.wikia.com/wiki/Reign_of_Grelok). You play as Grognak, a mighty barbarian, and your goal is to put an end to the terrible reign of Grelok, an evil wizard.
author: Lukas Stejskal
